title: Sanctifier Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Sanctifier security analysis tool

ignore_paths.description: List of directory or file paths to ignore during scanning (e.g., ['target', '.git'])

enabled_rules.description: List of built-in security analysis rules to enable

ledger_limit.description: Maximum ledger size limit in bytes for the analysis engine

telemetry.description: Opt-in anonymous telemetry for rule IDs, run duration, and sanitized tool version

strict_mode.description: If true, the tool will exit with a non-zero code if any warnings are found

custom_rules.description: Definition of regex-based custom patterns to search for in contract source code

name.description: A unique, descriptive name for the custom rule

pattern.description: A regular expression pattern to match (e.g., 'unsafe\\s*\\{')

severity.description: The severity level reported when a match is found
